description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a smooth, medium-gray fabric. The sofa features three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions on the main section, with an extended chaise lounge on the right side. Both armrests are wide, flat, and padded, providing a contemporary and comfortable appearance. The legs are short, slightly tapered, and appear to be made of dark wood, positioned at the corners for stability. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative stitching or tufting. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living rooms.
description: A modern L-shaped gray sectional sofa with wide armrests, loose cushions, and a chaise lounge extension. The design is minimalist with smooth upholstery and short, dark wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, two seat cushions, and the chaise lounge on the right.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the thickness of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the uniform height of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the main seating area, armrest, and the end of the chaise lounge.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions on the main section, with a single cushion on the chaise lounge; all cushions are uniform in size and appear unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, flat, and padded armrests at both ends, straight profile, matching the sofa's height and covered in the same gray fabric.
attribute_leg_design: Short, slightly tapered legs made of dark wood, positioned at the corners and partially recessed for a subtle appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with three large, loose cushions providing a uniform, high back support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
